name: OpenGait
description: A flexible and extensible framework for gait recognition. You can focus on designing your own models and comparing with state-of-the-arts easily with the help of OpenGait.
readme_summary: OpenGait is a Python-based framework designed for flexible and extensible gait recognition. It allows researchers to easily design and compare their own models against state-of-the-art methods, facilitating advancements in human identification through walking patterns.
key_features: Supports designing and comparing custom gait recognition models
Includes tutorials for datasets like GaitLU-1M and SUSTech1K
Active development with recent publications and model releases (e.g., BiggerGait, LidarGait++, DenoisingGait)
primary_use_case: Developing and evaluating novel gait recognition models.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist meticulously sculpting a unique human silhouette from a stream of abstract motion data. The artist uses glowing tools to refine the walking pattern, transforming raw input into a distinct, recognizable gait signature. In the background, a gallery displays various refined gait signatures, each representing a different individual. Subtle UI elements showing data streams and model parameters are integrated into the artist's workspace. The scene is set in a clean, modern studio with soft, focused lighting, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a cool color palette and clear, defined lines, emphasizing the transformation of raw data into identifiable patterns.

name: CF-Hero
description: CF-Hero is a reconnaissance tool that uses multiple data sources to discover the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications
readme_summary: CF-Hero is a Go-based reconnaissance tool designed to uncover the origin IP addresses of web applications protected by Cloudflare. It leverages multiple intelligence sources and DNS reconnaissance techniques to identify and validate potential origin IPs, aiming to bypass Cloudflare's protection.
key_features: Integration with search engines (ZoomEye, Censys, Shodan)
primary_use_case: Discovering the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications.
cover_image_prompt: A detective wearing a trench coat and a magnifying glass, standing in front of a large, imposing digital shield (representing Cloudflare). The detective is peering through the shield, revealing a hidden server rack with a glowing IP address behind it. Data streams and historical records are visualized as floating scrolls and charts around the detective. The repository name 'CF-Hero' is subtly integrated into a badge on the detective's coat. The scene should be a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, mysterious color palette, emphasizing the act of uncovering hidden information.

name: localsend
description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop
readme_summary: LocalSend is a free, open-source, cross-platform application designed for secure file and message sharing between nearby devices over a local network. It operates without requiring an internet connection or relying on third-party servers, utilizing a REST API and HTTPS encryption for secure communication.
primary_use_case: Securely and directly sharing files and messages between devices on the same local network without internet dependency.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration depicting two stylized, friendly robots standing on a bridge made of glowing data streams, passing a digital package between them. One robot is on the left side of the bridge, representing a sender, and the other is on the right, representing a receiver. The package is clearly visible, glowing with a secure aura. Subtle UI elements resembling a simple file transfer progress bar are integrated into the bridge's structure. The background is a clean, abstract representation of a local network, perhaps with faint, interconnected nodes. The overall mood is secure, efficient, and direct. The art style should be a clean, modern 3D isometric illustration with a bright, friendly color palette, emphasizing the direct peer-to-peer connection.

name: museeks
description: 🎵 A simple, clean and cross-platform music player
readme_summary: Museeks is a simple, clean, and cross-platform music player built with Tauri and React. It offers essential music playback features like library management, playlists, queue control, and playback speed adjustments, aiming for a user-friendly experience across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
key_features: Supported audio formats: mp3, mp4, m4a/aac, flac, wav, ogg, 3gpp
primary_use_case: A desktop application for playing and managing music files with a focus on simplicity and a clean user interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot DJ carefully organizing and playing music from a collection of glowing vinyl records and digital music files. The robot is on a clean, minimalist stage, with subtle UI elements of a music player interface floating around it, showing album art and playback controls. The background is a soft, gradient blend of blues and purples, with subtle digital particles flowing from the records to a central speaker. The overall mood is calm and organized, representing a simple yet effective music playback experience. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and clear, friendly character design, incorporating the 'Museeks' name subtly on a digital display.

name: InnerTune
description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android
readme_summary: InnerTune is an Android application that provides a Material 3-themed client for YouTube Music. It allows users to stream music from YouTube Music without ads, offering features like background playback, offline downloads, synchronized lyrics, and Android Auto support.
key_features: Search songs, videos, albums, and playlists
Cache and download songs for offline playback
primary_use_case: To provide an enhanced, ad-free music listening experience for YouTube Music on Android devices, with advanced playback and customization features.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a person comfortably relaxing in a modern, minimalist room, wearing headphones. Instead of a typical screen, they are interacting with a holographic interface projecting a dynamic, colorful soundwave emanating from a stylized YouTube Music logo. Subtle digital particles and glowing lines connect the interface to the headphones, symbolizing seamless, ad-free audio streaming. The overall mood is one of serene enjoyment and advanced digital music consumption. The scene should be rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette, emphasizing the 'InnerTune' name subtly integrated into the holographic display.

name: glide
description: An extensible and keyboard-focused web browser
readme_summary: Glide Browser is an extensible, keyboard-focused web browser built on Firefox. It aims to provide a highly efficient browsing experience for users who prefer keyboard navigation, offering features like modal keymaps, fuzzy tab management, and site-specific settings.
primary_use_case: Providing an efficient, keyboard-centric web browsing experience by extending the Firefox browser.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled conductor orchestrating a symphony of web pages using only a keyboard as their baton. The conductor stands at a futuristic console, with glowing keys and a screen displaying a dynamic, organized flow of information. Each keystroke triggers a precise action, like pages smoothly rearranging, tabs appearing and disappearing, or settings adjusting instantly. Subtle digital particles and UI elements hint at the underlying browser technology. The scene is set in a minimalist, modern control room with cool, focused lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and efficiency, with the 'Glide Browser' name subtly integrated into the console.
